painPoint: Your current Shopify theme is slowing you down — literally. A 6-second mobile load time is costing you customers before they even see your products.
whyThisPackage: You need speed, a strong mobile experience, and the ability to launch new collections fast — Shopify with a custom theme is the right call, not a heavyweight custom build.
features: Custom Shopify theme built from scratch — zero pre-built templates
Mobile-first product pages optimised for your fashion catalogue
Core Web Vitals score above 90 — fast load, smooth scroll
Collection filtering and size-based search tailored to apparel
Klaviyo integration for abandoned cart and post-purchase flows
SEO-ready structure so your collections rank on Google
excluded: Custom admin dashboard — Shopify's native dashboard handles everything you need right now.
Mobile app — your web store will perform like one already.
deliverables: A speed-optimised homepage that showcases your latest collection
Mobile-first product pages built for your apparel catalogue
Integrated checkout with Razorpay and COD support
A collection landing page system you can manage without a developer

projects.name: Aura Skincare
projects.summary: Custom Shopify store with filterable collections, Klaviyo email flows, and a 94 Lighthouse score. Conversion rate improved 2.4x within 60 days of launch.

projects.name: Drape & Co.
projects.summary: D2C fashion brand migrated from a template store to a fully custom Shopify theme. Mobile load time dropped from 7s to under 1.8s.

steps.title: Strategy & Planning
steps.description: Finalise sitemap, platform decisions, and design direction together. You'll have a clear project brief signed off by Day 5.

steps.title: UI/UX Design
steps.description: Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups reviewed and approved by you. No development starts until you're happy with the design.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Full Shopify build with custom theme, all integrations wired up, and performance optimisation baked in from the start.

steps.title: QA & Revisions
steps.description: Cross-device and cross-browser testing, your feedback round, and final polish before we go live.

steps.title: Launch & Handoff 🚀
steps.description: Go live with full documentation, a handoff call, and 30 days of post-launch monitoring and support included.

faq.question: How do revisions work?
faq.answer: You get two rounds of revisions at the design stage and one round during development. Anything beyond that scope is billed separately at a flat hourly rate we agree on upfront — no surprises.

faq.question: What if I need changes after launch?
faq.answer: The first 30 days post-launch are fully covered — bug fixes and minor tweaks are included. Larger feature additions or redesigns are scoped and quoted separately.

faq.question: Do I own the code after the project?
faq.answer: 100%. Once the final payment is made, you own everything — the theme code, assets, and any custom integrations. No licensing fees, no lock-in.

faq.question: Can you work with my existing Shopify store?
faq.answer: Yes — I can redesign and rebuild on top of your existing store, preserving your products, orders, and customer data. Or we migrate cleanly to a fresh setup. We'll decide together on the discovery call.

personalNote: Priya, after our conversation last week, it's clear you've built something real with Zara Collective — the product quality is there. What's holding you back is infrastructure, not product. The store experience doesn't match the brand you've created. That's exactly the gap we fix. This proposal is built specifically around your goals, your timeline, and your customers.

painPoint: Your clinic is live on Dentee's generic subdomain — but patients searching 'dentist in Lucknow' on Google aren't finding you. A rented subdomain can't rank. You're paying every month for a platform you don't own.
whyThisPackage: You don't need a complex system — you need a fast, trustworthy website on your own domain that ranks locally on Google, builds patient confidence, and lets them book appointments directly. One-time investment, zero monthly platform fees.
features: Custom website on your own domain (e.g. swastikdentalclinic.com) — you own it forever
Mobile-first design built for patients browsing on phones
Online appointment booking with WhatsApp and call integration
Local SEO setup so you rank for 'dentist in Lucknow' on Google
Doctor profile page for Dr. Jyoti Kumari with credentials and specialisations
Services pages for each treatment — Cleaning, RCT, Implants, Cosmetic Dentistry
Patient testimonials and gallery section to build trust
Google My Business optimisation for local map visibility
excluded: Full practice management software — your existing Dentee account handles appointments internally just fine for now.
Mobile app — your new website will function like one already on any smartphone.
deliverables: A professional clinic website on your own domain — no more Dentee subdomain
SEO-optimised service pages targeting Lucknow dental search terms
WhatsApp & call booking buttons on every page for instant patient contact
Google My Business profile fully set up and optimised
Doctor profile page showcasing Dr. Jyoti Kumari's 15 years of experience
Patient gallery and feedback section to build credibility

projects.name: Clove Dental
projects.summary: Migrated from a generic Practo listing to a fully custom website. Own domain, own brand, 94 Lighthouse score. Monthly new patient walk-ins doubled within 45 days.

projects.name: SmileCare Dental
projects.summary: Custom dental website with local SEO setup. Ranked on page 1 of Google for 'dentist in Lucknow' within 60 days. Patient enquiries increased 3x through WhatsApp booking.

steps.title: Discovery & Planning
steps.description: We finalise your domain, sitemap, service list, and design direction together. You'll have a clear project plan signed off before anything begins.

steps.title: UI/UX Design
steps.description: Wireframes and full design mockups reviewed and approved by you. Clean, medical-grade design that builds patient trust instantly.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Full custom website built in Laravel with all integrations — WhatsApp booking, Google Maps, appointment form, gallery, and SEO structure baked in from day one. Built to be fast, secure, and fully yours.

steps.title: SEO & GMB Setup
steps.description: Local SEO configuration, schema markup for medical practices, and full Google My Business optimisation so patients find you on Maps immediately.

steps.title: Launch & Handoff 🚀
steps.description: Go live with full documentation, a walkthrough call, and 30 days of post-launch support. Your team can manage content easily through a simple admin panel.

faq.question: Will I lose my existing patient data from Dentee?
faq.answer: Not at all. Your Dentee account can continue running in the background for internal management if you prefer. The new website is a separate, better front-facing presence for patients — it doesn't touch your existing data.

faq.question: Do I need to pay anything monthly after the website is live?
faq.answer: Only standard domain and hosting costs — typically ₹3,000–₹5,000 per year total. No platform fees, no subscriptions, no lock-in. You own everything.

faq.question: Can patients book appointments directly from the website?
faq.answer: Yes. We'll set up a WhatsApp booking button, a click-to-call button, and an appointment request form — all directly connected to your phone. No third-party system needed.

faq.question: How will this help me get more patients?
faq.answer: Through local SEO, your clinic will appear when someone in Lucknow searches 'dentist near me' or 'dental clinic in Lucknow' on Google. A Dentee subdomain cannot rank for these terms — your own domain can.

faq.question: What if I need to update my services or add new doctors later?
faq.answer: The website comes with a simple admin panel so your staff can update content, add services, or upload gallery photos without any technical knowledge. And for anything bigger, I'm just a message away.

personalNote: Dr. Jyoti Kumari, you have 15 years of experience, a well-equipped clinic, and a genuine reputation in Lucknow — but right now, patients searching for a dentist online can't find you because a Dentee subdomain simply doesn't rank on Google. Your expertise deserves a digital presence that matches it. This proposal is built specifically for Swastik Dental Clinic — to get you found, trusted, and booked by more patients in Lucknow.
